sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel movement data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Weapon System
special_mechanics.description: Mike wields a yo-yo as primary weapon; additional weapons and tools unlock as player progresses, including items influenced by American baseball

special_mechanics.name: Submarine Navigation
special_mechanics.description: Nav-Com robot permits Mike to use uncle's submarine to search and travel between islands

special_mechanics.name: Perspective Shift
special_mechanics.description: Game switches from overhead/top-down view in settlements to closer view in dungeons for combat and navigation

tier_notes: Tier 2: No movement physics values documented in any source. Documentation covers game structure, gameplay mechanics, development info, and debug features but does not include specific movement parameters, jump physics, or sub-pixel systems.
